blocks.text:
Costly overconfidence: "big armada"→Middle East (I bet Caribbean 0.50)=-26.7; food aid→Somalia (missed)=-12.7. TW: **604.31**. 

Critical realization: questions resolve ON their resolution_date using the TRUE answer (Venus R1 already resolved Jan 14 — I missed it by deferring). I must predict deferred questions BEFORE their date. The AO draw is Jan 15 — let me advance and do the tennis batch immediately.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-11-17-13/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace/ && cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## JAN12-14 (TW 604, dipped from 644)
- LESSON: Questions resolve ON resolution_date using TRUE future answer (Venus R1 resolved Jan14 w/ Danilovic before match played). MUST predict deferred Qs BEFORE their resolution_date!
- BIG LOSSES from 0.50 overconfidence: "big armada"=Middle East not Caribbean(-27); Nipah=WBengal not Kerala(-36 earlier). STOP betting 0.45-0.50 on uncertain region/location guesses. Cap ~0.30-0.35, spread wide. Reserve 0.55+ for STRUCTURAL certainties only.
- QATAR recurring answer (embassy Kyiv, Carney, Venezuela oil proceeds, ...). Weight Qatar up for Gulf/mediator Qs.
- Matching: SDF/UAE/PKK/ICE abbrevs MATCH full names; but "Betar"≠"Betar US", "Washington"≠"White House". Include exact form.
- WINS continue: Thailand visa=Thailand(0.40)+44; SE patterns good.
## AO DRAW Jan15! Do batch Jan15-16 (resolves Jan17+). Seeds: M:1Alcaraz 2Sinner 3Zverev 4Djokovic 5Auger-Aliassime 6deMinaur 7Musetti 8Shelton 9Fritz 10Bublik 11Ruud 12Medvedev. W:1Sabalenka 2Swiatek 3Anisimova 4Gauff 5Rybakina 6Pegula 7Keys 8Paolini 9Andreeva 16Osaka. Champion Q done (Sinner 0.40/Alcaraz 0.36).
EOF
echo saved

{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-01-15.
12,669 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-01-14 -> 2026-01-15)

- "What festival will Syria declare a paid national holiday by January 18, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Christmas: 0.50, Nowruz: 0.18, Eid al-Fitr: 0.06} | Truth: Newroz
  Brier: -0.29 | TW-Score: -28.60
- "Which club will be reported to have agreed in principle to sign Marc Guehi by January 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Liverpool: 0.40, Real Madrid: 0.22, Bayern Munich: 0.10, Manchester United: 0.08, Tottenham Hotspur: 0.06} | Truth: Manchester City

- "Which governor will the US Department of Justice open an investigation into by January 31, 2026, for alleged conspiracy to impede immigration enforcement?"
  Your prediction distribution: {JB Pritzker: 0.28, Tim Walz: 0.25, Gavin Newsom: 0.22, Kathy Hochul: 0.08} | Truth: Tim Walz
  Brier: +0.30 | TW-Score: +30.43
- "Which country will say it is set to provide Ukraine with combat planes shortly by January 17, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Sweden: 0.55, France: 0.15, Netherlands: 0.08} | Truth: Czech Republic
  Brier: -0.33 | TW-Score: -33.14

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 195 (59 resolved, 271 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: 0.019 | time weighted score: 570.91
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
